name: Vasco Quintela-Sampaio
summary: Dedicated Backend Engineer with over 5 years of experience in building scalable microservices and robust API architectures. Proven track record in optimizing Java-based systems and collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-performance software solutions.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.description: Lead the development of core payment processing modules using Java 17 and Spring Boot. Reduced latency by 25% through database query optimization and caching strategies.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained RESTful APIs for e-commerce platforms. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and automated testing suites to improve deployment reliability.

experience.title: Junior Java Developer
experience.description: Assisted in the migration of legacy monolithic applications to microservices. Gained hands-on experience with Spring Framework and PostgreSQL database management.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
